name: n8n RAG Whatsapp Chatbot Better Version

parameters.filter: ={{ JSON.stringify({ must: [{ key: "groupId", match: { value: $("Webhook").first().json.body.groupId } }, { key: "type", match: { value: "member_profile" } }] }) }}

={{ (() => { const body = $("Webhook").first().json.body; const nowSeconds = Number(body.timestamp ? body.timestamp : Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000)); const sinceSeconds = nowSeconds - 5 * 60; return JSON.stringify({ must: [{ key: "groupId", match: { value: body.groupId } }, { key: "type", match: { value: "whatsapp_message" } }, { key: "timestamp", range: { gte: sinceSeconds, lte: nowSeconds } }] }); })() }}

parameters.content:
## Main Chat Brain
Input, RAG retrieval, member context, web check, DeepSeek, short-term memory, and WhatsApp reply.

## Image
Generate or edit images, then return image output or a safe error message.

## Memory & Status
Record normal messages into Qdrant and answer the memory status command.

#Reranker 
Rerank 20 message from qdrant using llm reranker.
